skills.japaneseName: 翳り退く、さざめきの矢
skills.description: Increase velocity with a blazing spirit when pressured by another runner in the front part of the pack on the final corner or later.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: If someone has been trying to overtake you in the first half of the pack during the Final Leg or beyond, then on the Final Corner, your speed will increase
skills.japaneseDescription: レース終盤以降に先団で詰め寄られると最終コーナー以降に闘志を燃やして速度を上げ続ける

geneVersion.name: Arrows Whistle, Shadows Disperse
geneVersion.description: Slightly increase velocity when pressured by another runner in the front part of the pack on the final corner or later.

skills.name: Eternal Moments
skills.description: Increase velocity when starting to make a move from a position toward the front mid-race.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: If you're near the front during the Middle Leg and try to overtake someone, your speed will increase
skills.japaneseDescription: レース中盤で前の方から仕掛け始める時に速度が上がる

geneVersion.name: Eternal Moments
geneVersion.description: Slightly increase velocity when starting to make a move from a position toward the front mid-race.

skills.name: Break It Down!
skills.description: If positioned toward the front on a straight late-race, increase velocity with high spirits. If the straight is on the backstretch, also increase acceleration very slightly.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: During the Final Leg or beyond, if you're in the front during any straight, your speed will increase; if the straight is on the opposite side from the audience, your acceleration will slightly increase too
skills.japaneseDescription: 終盤以降の直線で前方にいると意気揚々と速度を上げる、さらにそこが向正面の場合加速力をわずかに上げる

geneVersion.name: Break It Down!
geneVersion.description: If positioned toward the front on a straight late-race, slightly increase velocity. If the straight is on the backstretch, also increase acceleration very minimally.

skills.name: Best Day Ever
skills.description: If well-positioned late-race on the final corner or later, increase velocity. If there's a large distance left to the finish, also increase acceleration very slightly with perfect form.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: If you're in a good position during the Final Corner or beyond, your speed will increase; if there's still more than 400m left in the race, your acceleration will increase too
skills.japaneseDescription: 終盤以降かつ最終コーナー以降に好位置にいると速度が上がるさらにゴールまで遠いと最高の走りで加速力がちょっと上がる

geneVersion.name: Best day ever
geneVersion.description: If well-positioned late-race on the final corner or later, slightly increase velocity. If there's a large distance left to the finish, also increase acceleration very minimally.

skills.name: Presents from X
skills.description: Increase velocity by deriving a path to victory mid-race after staying well-positioned from the start of the race up until the second half.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: If you maintain good position from the start to the second half of the race, your speed will increase
skills.japaneseDescription: レース後半まで好位置を維持し続けるとレース中盤に勝利への道筋を見出し速度を上げる

geneVersion.name: Presents from X
geneVersion.description: Slightly increase velocity mid-race after staying well-positioned from the start of the race up until the second half.

skills.name: Flowery☆Maneuver
skills.japaneseName: フラワリー☆マニューバ
skills.description: Increase velocity when passing another runner toward the front on the final corner. If passing toward the back, increase acceleration instead.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: If you overtake someone during the Final Corner or beyond, then: 1) if you're in the front, your speed will increase; 2) if you're in the middle of the pack, your acceleration will increase
skills.japaneseDescription: 最終コーナー以降に前の方で抜くと速度が後ろの方で抜くと加速力が上がる

geneVersion.name: Flowery☆Maneuver
geneVersion.description: Slightly increase velocity when passing another runner toward the front on the final corner. If passing toward the back, slightly increase acceleration instead.

skills.name: Operation Cacao
skills.description: Take a slight breather and increase velocity when in the front part of the pack and detecting another runner coming from behind on a corner mid-race.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: During any Middle Leg corner, if you detect another girl right behind you, your speed will increase and stamina will recover
skills.japaneseDescription: 中盤のコーナーで先団を走行中後ろに他ウマ娘を検知するとわずかに息を入れ、速度が上がる

geneVersion.name: Operation Cacao
geneVersion.description: Take a minimal breather and slightly increase velocity when in the front part of the pack and there's another runner coming from behind on a corner mid-race.

skills.name: Every Rose Has Its Fangs
skills.description: Suck endurance from runners ahead when well-positioned and pressured by another runner mid-race.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: During the Middle Leg, if you're in the first half of the pack but aren't in the lead, your speed will slightly increase, your stamina will recover, and you will drain stamina from all enemies ahead of you
skills.japaneseDescription: レース中盤で好位置だと前方のウマ娘から持久力を吸い取り自分の速度を少し上げる

geneVersion.name: Every Rose Has Its Fangs
geneVersion.description: Slightly drain endurance from runners ahead when well-positioned and pressured by another runner mid-race.

skills.name: Guten Appetit ♪

skills.japaneseDescription: 最終コーナー以降に2回追い抜くと抱いた誇りを力に変えて最終直線で速度を上げ続ける

geneVersion.name: Guten Appetit ♪
geneVersion.description: Slightly increase velocity continuously on the final straight after passing another runner 3 times on the final corner or later.

skills.name: One True Color

skills.japaneseDescription: 残り350mを切って前の方で後ろのウマ娘との距離が近いと譲らぬ思いで抜け出しやすくなる

geneVersion.name: One True Color
geneVersion.description: If positioned toward the front with 350m remaining and there is another Umamusume close behind, break out of the pack slightly more easily.

skills.name: Dancing in the Leaves

skills.japaneseDescription: 最終コーナー走行中に中団で競り合うと抜け出しやすくなる

geneVersion.name: Dancing in the Leaves

skills.japaneseDescription: 最終直線を好位置で走行中前のウマ娘との距離が近いと抜け出しやすくなる

geneVersion.name: Give Mummy a Hug ♡

skills.japaneseDescription: 最終コーナーで先頭から離されているとその距離が遠いほど頑張り続けて速度を少しずつ上げる

skills.japaneseDescription: レース後半に後方で詰め寄られるとマシマシの幸運パワーが身体に実り速度が上がる

skills.japaneseDescription: 終盤目前の下り坂で中団に控えていてゴールまで遠いとレースを思いっきり楽しんで速度を上げる

skills.japaneseDescription: レース後半に中団にいると速度が上がり加速力がちょっと上がる＜作戦・差し＞

skills.name: Fearless
skills.description: When positioned in the midpack during the second half of the race, slightly increase velocity and very minimally increase acceleration. (Late Surger)
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Betweener・If you're in the middle of the pack at a random point during the second half of the race, your speed and acceleration will slightly increase
skills.japaneseDescription: レース後半に中団にいると速度がわずかに上がり加速力がほんのちょっと上がる＜作戦・差し＞

skills.name: Wild Wind
skills.description: When positioned toward the front mid-race, increase velocity and slightly decrease the velocity of runners behind the user. (Medium)
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Medium・If you're in the front during the Middle Leg, you will drain the speed of the girls behind you and speed up yourself
skills.japaneseDescription: レース中盤に前の方にいると後ろの速度をわずかに下げ自分の速度を上げる＜中距離＞

skills.name: With All My Soul

skills.oldEnglishDescription: Medium・If you're in the front during the Middle Leg, you will slightly drain the speed of the girls behind you and slightly speed up yourself
skills.japaneseDescription: レース中盤に前の方にいると後ろの速度をほんのわずかに下げ自分の速度をわずかに上げる＜中距離＞

skills.name: You're Not the Boss of Me!
skills.oldEnglishName: Don't Tell Me What to Do!

skills.description: Increase time lost to slow starts and moderately decrease Wit.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Your Wisdom stat is decreased by 40 and you are guaranteed to start late
skills.japaneseDescription: 出遅れる時間が長くなり賢さが少し下がる

skills.name: Keep Going!
skills.description: Greatly consume endurance mid-race and greatly increase velocity. (Late Surger)
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Betweener・At a random point during the Middle Leg, use a little extra stamina to increase your speed greatly
skills.japaneseDescription: レース中盤に持久力を少し使って速度をすごく上げる＜作戦・差し＞

skills.name: Full Throttle

skills.oldEnglishDescription: Betweener・At a random point during the Middle Leg, use a little extra stamina to increase your speed
skills.japaneseDescription: レース中盤に持久力を少し使って速度を少し上げる＜作戦・差し＞

skills.name: Restraint
skills.description: Increase Wit and moderately decrease the chance of being Rushed.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Your Wisdom stat is increased by 60 and you're a little harder to panic
skills.japaneseDescription: 賢さが上がり、少し掛かりづらくなる

skills.name: Downhill Speedster
skills.description: Slightly increase velocity on downhills.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: At a random point on a random downhill, your speed will slightly increase
skills.japaneseDescription: 下り坂で速度がわずかに上がる

skills.name: 99 Problems
skills.description: Get overwhelmed by powerful opponents, moderately decreasing Guts and Wit.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Your Guts and Wisdom stat are decreased by 40
skills.japaneseDescription: 圧倒的なウマ娘たちに気圧され根性と賢さが少し下がる

skills.name: Burning Spirit SPD

skills.oldEnglishDescription: During the Middle Leg, the higher the total speed of your team, the more your speed increases
skills.japaneseDescription: レース中盤にアオハル魂が燃えレース中のチームメンバーのスピード合計が高いほど速度が上がる

skills.name: Ignited Spirit SPD
skills.description: Burn bright with team spirit, slightly increasing velocity in proportion to the total Speed of racing team members mid-race.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: During the Middle Leg, the higher the total speed of your team, the more your speed increases
skills.japaneseDescription: レース中盤にアオハル魂が燃えレース中のチームメンバーのスピード合計が高いほど速度がわずかに上がる

skills.name: Burning Spirit STA
skills.description: Burn bright with team spirit, recovering endurance in proportion to the total Stamina of racing team members mid-race.

skills.japaneseDescription: レース中盤にアオハル魂が燃えレース中のチームメンバーのスタミナ合計が高いほど持久力が回復する

skills.name: Ignited Spirit STA
skills.description: Burn bright with team spirit, slightly recovering endurance in proportion to the total Stamina of racing team members mid-race.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: During the Middle Leg, the higher the total stamina of your team, the more your stamina recovers
skills.japaneseDescription: レース中盤にアオハル魂が燃えレース中のチームメンバーのスタミナ合計が高いほど持久力がわずかに回復する

skills.name: Burning Spirit PWR

skills.oldEnglishDescription: During the Final Leg, the higher the total power of your team, the more your acceleration increases
skills.japaneseDescription: レース終盤にアオハル魂が燃えレース中のチームメンバーのパワー合計が高いほど加速力が上がる

skills.name: Ignited Spirit PWR
skills.description: Burn bright with team spirit, slightly increasing acceleration in proportion to the total Power of racing team members late-race.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: During the Final Leg, the higher the total power of your team, the more your acceleration increases
skills.japaneseDescription: レース終盤にアオハル魂が燃えレース中のチームメンバーのパワー合計が高いほど加速力がわずかに上がる

skills.name: Burning Spirit GUTS
skills.description: Burn bright with team spirit, increasing vigor in proportion to the total Guts of racing team members late-race.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: During the Final Leg, the higher the total guts of your team, the more your speed and acceleration increase
skills.japaneseDescription: レース終盤にアオハル魂が燃えレース中のチームメンバーの根性合計が高いほど脚に力強さが宿る

skills.name: Ignited Spirit GUTS
skills.description: Burn bright with team spirit, very slightly increasing vigor in proportion to the total Guts of racing team members late-race.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: During the Final Leg, the higher the total guts of your team, the more your speed and acceleration increase
skills.japaneseDescription: レース終盤にアオハル魂が燃えレース中のチームメンバーの根性合計が高いほど脚にちょっと力強さが宿る

skills.name: Burning Spirit WIT

skills.oldEnglishDescription: During the Opening Leg, the higher the total wisdom of your team, the better your positioning becomes
skills.japaneseDescription: レース序盤にアオハル魂が燃えしばらくレース中のチームメンバーの賢さ合計が高いほど先を見据えて走る

skills.name: Ignited Spirit WIT
skills.description: Burn bright with team spirit, slightly increasing strategic navigation for a medium duration in proportion to the total Wit of racing team members early-race.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: During the Opening Leg, the higher the total wisdom of your team, the better your positioning becomes
skills.japaneseDescription: レース序盤にアオハル魂が燃えしばらくレース中のチームメンバーの賢さ合計が高いほどわずかに先を見据えて走る

skills.name: Radiant Star
skills.description: Control breathing and kick forward in the second half of the race. Effect is increased in proportion to number of career wins.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: In the second half of the race, the more wins you've achieved in the training, the more your speed and acceleration increase, and your stamina recovers
skills.japaneseDescription: レース後半に呼吸を整え前へ踏み込む育成で重ねた勝利の数だけ効果が高まる

skills.name: Glittering Star
skills.description: Very slightly control breathing and kick forward in the second half of the race. Effect is increased in proportion to number of career wins.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: In the second half of the race, the more wins you've achieved in the training, the more your speed and acceleration increase, and your stamina recovers
skills.japaneseDescription: レース後半にちょっと呼吸を整え前へ踏み込む育成で重ねた勝利の数だけ効果が高まる

skills.name: Unquenched Thirst
skills.description: Moderately increase performance with the desire to race.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: The thirst for racing increases your Stamina stat by 40
skills.japaneseDescription: レースへの渇望により能力が少し発揮しやすくなる

skills.name: Unchanging
skills.description: Greatly increase performance with the same ambition of days past.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Feelings from the days past will increase your Speed stat by 80
skills.japaneseDescription: かつての走りとは違うがあの頃と変わらない想いが能力をすごく上げる

skills.name: Towards the Scenery I Seek
skills.description: Moderately increase performance in pursuit of that long sought-after scenery.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Frantically chasing after the scenery, your Speed stat is increased by 40
skills.japaneseDescription: 見たい景色を必死に追いかけ能力が少し発揮しやすくなる

skills.name: Creeping Anxiety

skills.japaneseDescription: トレーナーの恐れが伝播し能力が少し発揮しにくくなる

skills.name: Blatant Fear
skills.description: Greatly decrease velocity on a corner in the second half of the race due to Trainer's obvious anxiety.

skills.japaneseDescription: トレーナーの恐れがより鮮明になりレース後半のコーナーで速度がすごく下がる

skills.name: Dream Run

skills.japaneseDescription: みんなの想いと共にゴールを走り抜ける気持ちを強く持つと最終直線で速度を上げる

skills.name: Show Me What Lies Beyond!
skills.japaneseName: 未知への走りを見せてくれ
skills.description: Moderately increase Silence Suzuka's performance thanks to the desire to see her running reach new heights.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Silence Suzuka's Speed stat is increased by 40
skills.japaneseDescription: 次のステージを見せてくれる期待を伝えてサイレンススズカの能力を少し発揮しやすくさせる

skills.name: Hoiya! Have a Good Run!
skills.description: Moderately increase Silence Suzuka's performance thanks to a charm that guarantees a satisfying run.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Silence Suzuka's Stamina stat is increased by 40
skills.japaneseDescription: 気持ちよく走れるおまじないをしてサイレンススズカの能力を少し発揮しやすくさせる

skills.name: As a Friend and Rival
skills.oldEnglishName: As a Friend, as a Rival
skills.japaneseName: 友として、ライバルとして
skills.description: Moderately increase Silence Suzuka's performance through the happiness felt seeing a friend find their running style.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Silence Suzuka's Power stat is increased by 40
skills.japaneseDescription: 自分だけの走りを見つけた親友への激励がサイレンススズカの能力を少し発揮しやすくさせる

skills.name: Cheers of a Fellow Dreamer
skills.description: Recover Silence Suzuka's endurance on a corner in the second half of the race through a friend's cheers of support.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: When Silence Suzuka hears shouts of support in the second half of the race, her stamina will recover
skills.japaneseDescription: レース後半のコーナーで思いっきりの応援が届くとサイレンススズカの持久力が回復する

skills.name: Chin Up, Derby Umamusume!
skills.japaneseName: 胸を張れダービーウマ娘
skills.description: Feel closer to being Japan's top racer, moderately increasing performance.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Your Speed stat is increased by 40
skills.japaneseDescription: 日本一のウマ娘に一歩近づけた手ごたえにより能力が少し発揮しやすくなる

skills.name: For the Team
skills.oldEnglishName: As a Member of the Team
skills.description: The whole team feels super determined to win this special race, greatly increasing performance.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Your Stamina stat is increased by 80
skills.japaneseDescription: チーム全員が思い入れのあるレースを絶対に勝ちたいという気持ちにより能力がすごく発揮しやすくなる

skills.name: Ruler of Japan
skills.description: I'll tackle this with everything I've got!
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Your speed is increased in the last 400m of the race
skills.japaneseDescription: 全身全霊、ぶつけます！

skills.name: Indomitable
skills.description: I'll rise up to the challenge!
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Your speed is increased in the last 400m of the race
skills.japaneseDescription: 真剣勝負、いざ参ります！

skills.name: Carnival Bonus
skills.description: Increase attributes by +{0}％ in the Racing Carnival. {1}％ chance to also raise runner's mood to Great. This skill will disappear when the event ends.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Bonus points will be added to the carnival points obtained. This skill will disappear at the end of the event.
skills.japaneseDescription: レーシングカーニバルで獲得するカーニバルptにボーナスが付く（＋{0}％）このスキルはイベント終了時に消滅する

skills.name: Carnival Bonus
skills.description: Increase attributes by +{0}％ in the Racing Carnival. {1}％ chance to also raise runner's mood to Great. This skill will disappear when the event ends.

skills.japaneseDescription: レーシングカーニバルで基礎能力+{0}％、さらに{1}％の確率で絶好調になるこのスキルはイベント終了時に消滅する

skills.name: Feelin' a Bit Silly
skills.description: Greatly decrease the racer's proficiency in starting races. Effects include slow starts and reduced starting acceleration. Removed at the end of the Career playthrough.
skills.oldEnglishDescription: Guarantees a late start and lowers your acceleration tremendously. This skill will disappear at the end of the training.
skills.japaneseDescription: スタートがすごく苦手になり出遅れたりスタート時の加速力が低下したりするこのスキルは育成完了後に消滅する

skills.japaneseName: 長距離レースへの想い

skills.oldEnglishDescription: Turf・Long・Your Stamina stat is increased by 60
skills.japaneseDescription: 芝・長距離レースが得意になるこのスキルはイベント専用になります

skills.name: Mile Race Enthusiast
skills.japaneseName: マイルレースへの想い

skills.japaneseDescription: 芝・マイルレースが得意になるこのスキルはイベント専用になります
